project_type: Python FastAPI + Jinja2 dashboard with CLI for multi-agent investment analysis
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[data]' 2. python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 3. python -c 'from dashboard.app import app; print(app.title)'
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Python 3.11 default.
contribution_requirements: Direct commit to main, Chinese commit messages, commit after each task
key_patterns: Dashboard uses FastAPI+Jinja2 templates in dashboard/templates/, CSS in dashboard/static/css/bloomberg.css (2629 lines), app.py is monolithic (~1077 lines), SVG avatars in docs/images/avatars/, data.py has provider chain pattern with TTL cache, report.py generates professional Markdown reports
directory_structure: src/augur/ - core Python package, dashboard/ - FastAPI app+templates+static, tests/ - pytest tests, docs/ - documentation+images, personas/ - YAML persona definitions
